Added: This “What’s new” notice, so you are told about platform updates the next time you sign in.
A workspace dashboard surfacing storage and file-format trends for administrators.
Improved: Faster, more reliable uploads for large multi-gigabyte transfers.
Clearer preservation status labels while packages are being characterised.
Fixed: Occasional metadata save errors when editing PREMIS records have been resolved.

Added: Open and read ingested MBOX and PST messages directly in Curate, without downloading them.
Improved: Accessibility refinements across the file browser and information panels.
